elements.name: Source Change approved
elements.documentation: The operator approves the first Change in the two-Change TASK-6 delivery.

elements.name: Add optional flow evidence
elements.documentation: Accept and stamp evidence on sequence flows without invalidating historical plan specs that omit it.

elements.name: Define wiki diagram refresh
elements.documentation: Teach the dedicated maintainer procedure to require evidence on every wiki node and edge, regenerate through the shared pipeline, publish attributed PNGs, and verify determinism.

elements.name: Update pipeline tests and docs
elements.documentation: Cover backward compatibility, lossless sequence-flow evidence, the existing subset gate, and the maintainer-facing generation contract.

elements.name: Run focused checks
elements.documentation: Run the full BPMN pipeline suite, validate changed Skills, and inspect the repository diff.

elements.name: Verification entry
elements.documentation: Merge the initial implementation path and every correction path before rerunning focused checks.

elements.name: Checks green?
elements.documentation: Only verified source enablement advances to independent review.

elements.name: Fix check failures
elements.documentation: Correct only in-scope failures and rerun the checks that observe them.

elements.name: Run fresh-context review
elements.documentation: Delegate the exact verified delta to an independent read-only reviewer before commit or publication.

elements.name: Confirmed findings?
elements.documentation: The owning agent verifies reviewer findings and distinguishes real in-scope defects from non-findings.

elements.name: Fix confirmed findings
elements.documentation: Resolve confirmed in-scope findings and rerun affected checks before another handoff attempt.

elements.name: Open source enablement PR
elements.documentation: Commit and push the green reviewed source Change and open its pull request with Check evidence.

elements.name: PR green?
elements.documentation: The first Change is ready only when its applicable GitHub Checks pass.

elements.name: Fix PR failures
elements.documentation: Correct an in-scope handoff failure and return through local verification and review.

elements.name: Source PR green for handoff
elements.documentation: The source enablement Change is ready for operator disposition; Task 6 remains active for the separate maintainer Change.
